channel.title: Cautious Optimism Briefings (Staging)
channel.description: Staging feed for testing briefings before they go to the main show. Not the public production show.
channel.itunes:summary: Staging feed for testing briefings before they go to the main show. Not the public production show.
channel.itunes:author: Cautious Optimism

item.title: Staging seed — The Throughline — July 9, 2026
item.description:
Seed episode so the staging feed is valid for Spotify submission; safe to delete once real test episodes are published.
Published July 9, 2026 at 11:55 PM (ET).
Read the full transcript: https://marange63.github.io/Spotify/test/transcripts/throughline-2026-07-09.html
item.itunes:summary:
Seed episode so the staging feed is valid for Spotify submission; safe to delete once real test episodes are published.
Published July 9, 2026 at 11:55 PM (ET).
